verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, I, I wanna be a blessing, too Can You use me, Jesus, Is there something I can do? Take this little vessel, Lord I give it all to You 'Cause I wanna be a blessing Can I be a blessing, too?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My daddy is a preacher My mama is a teacher Working for the Lord everyday My mama's on the keyboard My daddy plays the guitar Singing's just a part of their way And eveybidy is busy now Doing their part To get the Gospel Message through So I am just wondering, is there something I can do

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Josiah was running His kingdom as a young one And He turned his people Back to the Lord Little David fought the giant, That's being quite defiant Killed him with a sling and a sword And Jesus, when You are just 12 yrs old You did the Father's business, too So I'm ready and I'm waiting, Is there something I can do?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take this little vessel, Lord I give it all to You 'Cause I wanna be a blessing, can I be a blessing? Im available to You. . 'Cause I wanna be a blessing Can I be a blessing, too?
